brief_justification: Correct answer (C) with valid reasoning; Goes one level beyond surface by mapping all time slots into a table to identify the gap; No explicit self-monitoring beyond the injected suppression signals; Lists all occupied slots which implicitly verifies no overlap but doesn't explicitly check alternatives against the gap; Presents answer confidently without noting assumptions; Implicitly rejects other options by showing they're occupied but doesn't explicitly evaluate each alternative; Shows the schedule mapping clearly but doesn't narrate the elimination process step by step
